title: arundarbor luconiae
side_effects: Arundarbor luconiae can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Excessive consumption of its leaves or extracts can lead to stomach problems, nausea, and diarrhea. Overuse of the plant's essential oils may also cause skin irritation, inflammation, and even burns. Furthermore, the plant's interactions with certain medications can result in adverse reactions, such as increased bleeding or decreased blood pressure.
